holdings.infoBox: ARGT is an equity ETF with a total of 27 individual holdings. The top holdings are MercadoLibre stock at 20.83%, YPF Sociedad Anónima at 9.37%, Grupo Financiero Galicia at 6.93%, Vista Energy at 5.79%, and Banco Macro at 5.30%.

overview.description: The Global X MSCI Argentina ETF (ARGT) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI All Argentina 25/50 index. The fund tracks a narrow index of companies with Argentine economic linkages that are selected and weighted by market cap. ARGT was launched on Mar 2, 2011 and is issued by Global X.

data.text: It's a remarkable turnaround for Argentina, which had an economy near hyperinflation and a treasury headed for one more bankruptcy some 25 months ago.

data.title: Argentina's Markets Surge as Milei's Party Dominates Elections
data.text: Argentina's markets rallied sharply after President Javier Milei's party pulled off a surprisingly strong victory in Sunday's legislative elections. Dollar bonds and the peso both surged.

data.title: Argentina stocks and bonds surge after Milei's victory. Can the party continue?
data.text: Argentina stocks surged and bonds rallied following news that radical libertarian economist Javier Milei will become Argentina's next president after an unexpected electoral win.
